c.d: The number of active users or downloads signifying the popularity and community size of the app
Availability of features such as multistreaming, remote guest participation, custom branding, and real-time audience interaction
Whether the app is browser-based, mobile app, or hybrid, affecting accessibility and device compatibility
The pricing structure including availability of free tier, subscription costs, and any pay-per-use features
Range of content types available such as games, sports, movies, TV shows, music, or niche streams
Support across multiple devices including mobile phones, tablets, smart TVs, and desktops
Average user rating on app stores reflecting user satisfaction and app quality
